abort_evidence_binding.statement: Superseding rerun reuses identical fixture_suite_hash, engine, effort, renderer, and lane order; live-001's 528 censored calls and spend are carried forward via budget_ledger opening actuals.

budget_ledger.output_ceiling_derivation: 134640 opening output tokens + 896 remaining calls × 2048 max_output_tokens = 1969648

commitment_invalid_rate_ceiling.discrete_consequence_at_n128: At K=128 observable invalid rates are multiples of 1/128; at most 6 invalids pass (6/128=0.046875); 7 fail.

early_censor_refusal.normalized_content_rule: strip <think>...</think> from final message content; empty after strip
